title: Acne in adolescent
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Covers distribution, lesion types, scarring, hyperpigmentation, hormonal patterns, pain, prior treatment, and psychological impact.
assessment.rationale: Supports adolescent acne distribution, lesions, scarring, prior treatment and psychological impact for adolescent acne; no decision is generated.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for the Virtual Management of Acne
source.population: Adolescents and adults with acne complaints, including post-adolescent acne.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth acne documentation; treatment selections remain clinician-entered and pending review.

source.evidence_paraphrase: Covers distribution, lesion types, scarring, hyperpigmentation, hormonal patterns, pain, prior treatment, and psychological impact.

assessment.text: Specifies lesion type and severity, skin type, scarring, hyperpigmentation, menstrual or androgen context, products, medicines, treatment history, and psychological impact.
assessment.rationale: Supports clinician-assessed acne severity and hormonal context for adolescent acne; no decision is generated.

assessment.rationale: Supports scarring, psychosocial, endocrine and severe-acne referral context for adolescent acne; no decision is generated.
